title: geranium lusitanicum
intro: Geranium lusitanicum, also known as the Cape Geranium or Portuguese Rose, is a perennial plant native to South Africa and the Mediterranean region, characterized by its fragrant pink or white flowers and edible roots. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Geranium lusitanicum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. Geranium lusitanicum can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or essential oil, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
